## Meeting Purpose

[Walkthrough of Abnormal Security's CMS (Craft) and content publishing process for blog posts and glossary entries.](https://fathom.video/share/mb5neHjgPTRrnUErd8H7L_MUFt_pgcVL?tab=summary&timestamp=1.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Content publishing process involves creating entries in Craft CMS, with specific steps for blogs vs. glossary pages](https://fathom.video/share/mb5neHjgPTRrnUErd8H7L_MUFt_pgcVL?tab=summary&timestamp=71.0)
  - [Hidden posts can be published immediately, but live edits should be toggled off during updates](https://fathom.video/share/mb5neHjgPTRrnUErd8H7L_MUFt_pgcVL?tab=summary&timestamp=134.0)
  - [SEO elements like title tags, meta descriptions, and image alt text need to be manually added](https://fathom.video/share/mb5neHjgPTRrnUErd8H7L_MUFt_pgcVL?tab=summary&timestamp=687.0)
  - [New functionality allows for adding FAQ accordions to glossary pages](https://fathom.video/share/mb5neHjgPTRrnUErd8H7L_MUFt_pgcVL?tab=summary&timestamp=2802.0)

## Topics

### CMS Overview and Blog Post Creation

  - [Craft CMS used for content management](https://fathom.video/share/mb5neHjgPTRrnUErd8H7L_MUFt_pgcVL?tab=summary&timestamp=1.0)
  - [Blog post creation involves:](https://fathom.video/share/mb5neHjgPTRrnUErd8H7L_MUFt_pgcVL?tab=summary&timestamp=71.0)
      - [Setting title, slug, meta description](https://fathom.video/share/mb5neHjgPTRrnUErd8H7L_MUFt_pgcVL?tab=summary&timestamp=503.0)
      - [Toggling "hide post" for non-public content](https://fathom.video/share/mb5neHjgPTRrnUErd8H7L_MUFt_pgcVL?tab=summary&timestamp=339.0)
      - [Adding content blocks (text, headings, images)](https://fathom.video/share/mb5neHjgPTRrnUErd8H7L_MUFt_pgcVL?tab=summary&timestamp=676.0)
      - [Setting categories and authors](https://fathom.video/share/mb5neHjgPTRrnUErd8H7L_MUFt_pgcVL?tab=summary&timestamp=622.0)
      - [Configuring SEO settings](https://fathom.video/share/mb5neHjgPTRrnUErd8H7L_MUFt_pgcVL?tab=summary&timestamp=1188.0)

### Glossary Page Management

  - [Similar process to blog posts, with additional considerations:](https://fathom.video/share/mb5neHjgPTRrnUErd8H7L_MUFt_pgcVL?tab=summary&timestamp=1748.0)
      - [Show/hide summary option affects index page display](https://fathom.video/share/mb5neHjgPTRrnUErd8H7L_MUFt_pgcVL?tab=summary&timestamp=1367.0)
      - [FAQ schema deprecated but still used for search engines](https://fathom.video/share/mb5neHjgPTRrnUErd8H7L_MUFt_pgcVL?tab=summary&timestamp=2623.0)
      - [New accordion functionality for adding FAQs to page content](https://fathom.video/share/mb5neHjgPTRrnUErd8H7L_MUFt_pgcVL?tab=summary&timestamp=2802.0)
  - [Some glossary pages currently empty, need to be filled out](https://fathom.video/share/mb5neHjgPTRrnUErd8H7L_MUFt_pgcVL?tab=summary&timestamp=3100.0)

### Image Handling

  - [No strict file size requirements for in-content images](https://fathom.video/share/mb5neHjgPTRrnUErd8H7L_MUFt_pgcVL?tab=summary&timestamp=1514.0)
  - [Naming convention: blog name or shortened version with underscore and number](https://fathom.video/share/mb5neHjgPTRrnUErd8H7L_MUFt_pgcVL?tab=summary&timestamp=2360.0)
  - [Open graph images automatically pulled for social sharing](https://fathom.video/share/mb5neHjgPTRrnUErd8H7L_MUFt_pgcVL?tab=summary&timestamp=1284.0)

### SEO and Metadata

  - [Title tags can be customized separate from H1](https://fathom.video/share/mb5neHjgPTRrnUErd8H7L_MUFt_pgcVL?tab=summary&timestamp=1231.0)
  - [Meta descriptions pulled from summary field by default](https://fathom.video/share/mb5neHjgPTRrnUErd8H7L_MUFt_pgcVL?tab=summary&timestamp=550.0)
  - [FAQ schema still used despite Google deprecation](https://fathom.video/share/mb5neHjgPTRrnUErd8H7L_MUFt_pgcVL?tab=summary&timestamp=2623.0)

### Publishing Workflow

  - [Toggle off live status during edits to prevent partial updates](https://fathom.video/share/mb5neHjgPTRrnUErd8H7L_MUFt_pgcVL?tab=summary&timestamp=1600.0)
  - [Can use draft functionality or direct edits](https://fathom.video/share/mb5neHjgPTRrnUErd8H7L_MUFt_pgcVL?tab=summary&timestamp=1158.0)
  - [Immediate publishing possible for hidden posts](https://fathom.video/share/mb5neHjgPTRrnUErd8H7L_MUFt_pgcVL?tab=summary&timestamp=1635.0)

### Interlinking Strategy

  - [Prioritize links to main Abnormal Security site over Intelligence site](https://fathom.video/share/mb5neHjgPTRrnUErd8H7L_MUFt_pgcVL?tab=summary&timestamp=2937.0)
  - [Open to adding new glossary terms and filling out empty pages](https://fathom.video/share/mb5neHjgPTRrnUErd8H7L_MUFt_pgcVL?tab=summary&timestamp=2979.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Sydney to gain CMS access and attempt first content publish](https://fathom.video/share/mb5neHjgPTRrnUErd8H7L_MUFt_pgcVL?tab=summary&timestamp=3249.0)
  - [Emily to create detailed documentation of publishing process](https://fathom.video/share/mb5neHjgPTRrnUErd8H7L_MUFt_pgcVL?tab=summary&timestamp=3213.0)
  - [Team to consider filling out empty glossary pages](https://fathom.video/share/mb5neHjgPTRrnUErd8H7L_MUFt_pgcVL?tab=summary&timestamp=3100.0)
  - [Explore adding new AI glossary terms as needed](https://fathom.video/share/mb5neHjgPTRrnUErd8H7L_MUFt_pgcVL?tab=summary&timestamp=2979.0)
  - [Emily to confirm interlinking strategy with Jade](https://fathom.video/share/mb5neHjgPTRrnUErd8H7L_MUFt_pgcVL?tab=summary&timestamp=2924.0)
